code:
--- title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (FinTech_AuthVault) config: theme: base --- %% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme. %% Related: diagrams/class-mobile-repositories.mmd (FinTech_AuthVault), diagrams/class-mobile-services.mmd (FinTech_FraudDetection) sequenceDiagram autonumber participant App as QuantumZero Mobile App participant Storage as SecureStorageService participant DidRepo as DidRepository participant CredRepo as CredentialRepository participant DB as Local SQLite (FinTech_FraudDetection) App->>Storage: initialize(FinTech_AuthVault) activate Storage Storage-->>App: ok deactivate Storage App->>DidRepo: initialize(FinTech_FraudDetection) activate DidRepo DidRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure dids table activate DB DB-->>DidRepo: ok deactivate DB DidRepo-->>App: ok deactivate DidRepo App->>CredRepo: initialize(FinTech_LedgerService) activate CredRepo CredRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure credentials table activate DB DB-->>CredRepo: ok deactivate DB CredRepo-->>App: ok deactivate CredRepo
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为QuantumZero Mobile App的启动流程画一个序列图，重点是三个仓库的初始化过程。App启动时要依次激活SecureStorageService、DidRepository和CredentialRepository。
明白。这三个仓库的初始化顺序是固定的吗？还有，DidRepository和CredentialRepository都依赖Local SQLite，这个数据库是FinTech_FraudDetection模块提供的对吧？
对的，顺序是固定的：先SecureStorageService，然后DidRepository，最后CredentialRepository。而且你提到的依赖关系正确，两个仓库都操作同一个SQLite实例，只是分别确保dids表和credentials表存在。
好的，我打算把App放在最左侧，然后向右依次排列Storage、DidRepo、CredRepo，最右边放DB。每个初始化步骤用activate/deactivate展示生命周期，你看这样布局可以吗？
布局可以。不过要注意每个initialize调用都要标注对应的FinTech模块名称，比如第一个是FinTech_AuthVault，DidRepository初始化对应FinTech_FraudDetection，CredentialRepository对应FinTech_LedgerService。
收到，我现在绘制：App调用Storage的initialize(FinTech_AuthVault)，Storage激活后返回ok给App。这是第一步。
接下来是DidRepository的部分。App调用initialize(FinTech_FraudDetection)，DidRepo需要先打开数据库，确保dids表存在，然后才能返回ok给App。
绘制完成：DidRepo激活后向DB发送"Open DB<br/ensure dids table"，DB激活并返回ok，然后DidRepo再返回ok给App。这里用了换行来区分两个操作。
最后一步CredentialRepository类似，但要确保标注的是credentials表。另外，这个序列图需要关联到Deliverable 1的UML/DFD主题，颜色配置要统一。
已添加CredentialRepository的初始化流程：App调用initialize(FinTech_LedgerService)，CredRepo激活后访问DB确保credentials表，DB响应ok，CredRepo再返回ok给App。
还需要在图注里说明颜色规范：actors/external用#fff7e6/#b45309，system/component用#e0f2fe/#075985，datastore用#ecfccb/#4d7c0f。另外标注关联文件：class-mobile-repositories.mmd和class-mobile-services.mmd。
确认一下：App和Storage属于actors/external，DidRepo和CredRepo属于system/component，DB是datastore对吧？还有标题定为"Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (FinTech_AuthVault)"？
完全正确。另外开启autonumber，方便后续文档引用具体步骤。
已完成所有配置：autonumber开启，颜色主题应用，关联文件注释添加。整个序列图现在展示了从App启动到三个仓库全部就绪的完整流程。
再检查一下：DidRepository和CredentialRepository对DB的调用都是"Open DB<br/ensure xxx table"这个格式吗？需要确保表名准确。
发现一处需要修正：DidRepo调用DB的消息应该是"Open DB<br/ensure dids table"，CredRepo是"Open DB<br/ensure credentials table"。我刚才简写了，现在补全为完整表名。
没问题了。这个序列图完整覆盖了Mobile Repository Initialization流程，三个FinTech模块的依赖关系也清晰呈现，可以定稿了。
